name: CAPSTONE GREEN ENERGY CORP
summary: CAPSTONE GREEN ENERGY CORP designs, manufactures, and services microturbine technology solutions for distributed power generation and waste heat recovery. Headquartered in Van Nuys, California, the company's microturbines are used in a variety of applications, including combined heat and power (CHP) systems, energy efficiency projects, and renewable energy integration. Capstone Green Energy aims to provide clean and reliable energy solutions to its customers.
